title: hieracium jankae subsp. marmoreiforme
intro: Hieracium jankae subsp. marmoreiforme is a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds, which have been shown to have antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. Hieracium jankae subsp. marmoreiforme can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote skin health and reduce inflammation.
